TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Tafalong == O kaitiraan nona niyaro' itiraay i saka'etp 'apilis no sawalian a tokos no Taywan.O no Tafalong no pangcah i, o sowal są a cecay, caay ka lacodad. pakayni i Fakong a Cilakala lotok a tyani ko tato'as no Tafalon a niyaro', i rikor i, ta malinah ko finawlan i Dong-fo niyaro' saan. Saka , Masa'alomanay ko i niyaro'ay a tamdaw ato caay ka pipalomaan a sera. samisalinalinahan kora paniyaro'an ngara tahaniniay Tafalon. i 'ayaw ho, adihay ko apalang hananayay a kalang i 'alo, saka, o "'afalong" ko 'ayaway a ngangan no Tafalon, falic han sano Kuwaping o Apalong hananay, o tatodong nonini a sowal o Adihayay ko kohecalay a kalang sanay , orasaka falic han to to Tafalong, ono sano Kuwaoingan a pangangan to 太巴塱 konini,巴塱 祖靈庇護之地 ,Nownews .</ref>o romai, lra ko kakahaday a sera hananay a sowal itini. O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Tafalong a riyaro', o ta'akay a niyaro' i ilaloma'ay no Guangfu-syang (光復鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Tafalon , itini i ira ko sepat a niyaro' pisaopoan, o kawalian a niyaro' ,o saetipan a niyaro' ,o satatimolan a niyaro' ato sa'amisan a niyaro' a masaopo itini i Tafalon, itira i Tafalonan iraay ko patiyamay iraay ko matayalay, oya to ko saka'aloman. sa o sowal no holam i o 富田 han. Pakayni i saka'orip o pala ko pinengnengan no Tafalon, i enaray ko 'orip a Pangcah haw i, fangcal ko pisapala no Tafalon, misafonon a malingad paedeng sa to kakaenen, tada adihay ko mapalomaay panay, o lamlo, o tefos, o konga, losay ato masamaamaa:nay. ira ko 'osaw mana'ang, to laday misadateng, anca talalotok mi'adop, midongec ato midateng to no pala a dateng, roma i, tala'alo mitafokod mifoting, ano i pala to, i fatad no lalan, i lawac no 'alo, i lotok to haw i, iraay ko mamalitod nangra itira. caay kanikaw to kakaenen. o roma i, Ira ko talolongay a rayray no Pangcah i Tafalong, mapakanengneng to ko 'atomo,nito'to'an,mitenoon ato nakamayan to saki'orip a lalosidan i niyaroan. sato maemin cinaneng ko mato'asay no 'Amis. i polong no lisin no Pangcah i laloma' no cecay a mihecaan, o satata'akay haw i, ya ilisin no kaloniyaro' itiniay i faloay a folad. o roma sato , itini i ira ko pita'ong ngara to to'as ato rayray no pangcah, onini a piilisinan a romi'ad, o kaolahan no mihololay a tayra mikapot to acang no kaloniyaro'. O Rikisi no Tafalong Misanga' to 'atomo O sowal no mana'angay a litid no rikisi i, i 'ayaw no cecay so'ot ira ko lima polo' a mihecaan, iraay to ko pisanga'an to 'atomo no Pangcah. o sarakatay misanga' to 'atomo ko 'Amis a finacadan saan ko sowal no rikisi. O Tafalong a niyaro' itiya ho i, o tata'akay pisanga'an to 'atomo, i 'ayaw ho, o sota' ko sapisanga' nangra to kapowa, adihay ko misanga'an to saki'orip a lalosidan, o kaysing, o sala, o kopo ato... masamaamaa:nay a kapowa. o nakamayan misanga'an a lalosidan i, o roma soto, ira ko 'atomo, o koreng, o tatoronan, o tamangan...ato masamaamaanay. nikaorira, yo tayni to ko Ripon a mikowan to Taywan how i, misatapang a misawad ko niyaro'ay a tamdaw to misa'atomo a tayal. pasayra to pisafonon a paloma to panay, nika manengneng ho ita ko pisanga'an to 'atomo a kaysiyaan no sa'ayaway i Atomo a niyaro'. O nikalopisak no Tafugan Do'edoen ko sa'osi no Citodongay tono kalotamdaw a demak no Kalinko kowan, ira ko 5,000 ko loma' 1.2 'ofad ko tamdaw no Tafalong, o sa'awaay ko tamdaw a niyaro' o 大華村ato 大富村, i 2022 mihecaan a sa'osi 'dengan 1,349 kotamdaw ato 315 kotamdaw. Tafalong Itiniay i Guangfu Cen no Hualien ko Tafalong a niyaro', 1,007 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,958 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 2,609 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 349 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis83%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomin itiniay i Guangfun-syang (光復鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen(花蓮縣sowal no holam) ko Tafalong a niyaro', O tatapangan a niyaro', ira ko Tafalong, o Fata'an a niyaro', o Kiwit a niyaro', mililis to tarawadaw no Siwkolang a siniyaro', na itira i tarawadaw no Kalingko talatimol tangasa i Cilamitay, nawhani maemin paniyaro' i lawac no Siwkolan a tarawadaw sa mapangangan to Siwkolan a 'amis. ira ko Fata'an a niyaro', o Tafalong a niyaro', o Sadoa niyaro', o Atomo a niyaro', o Kalotong a niyaro', o Kalotong a niyaro', o Fahol a niyaro', o Laso'ay a niyaro' ato O kakay a niyaro, falo a niyaro' ko pipolongan. O pitooran no finawlan O pitooran ko finawlan no Tafalong i, adihay ko pitooran no niyaro' a tamdaw, ira ko tingsikiw, o kirisito-kiw, o taw-kiw, o sintaw-kiw ato to'as a kawas no 'amis. o tingsikiw a tamdaw ko ka adihay. itini i ira ko pitooran ngara, pakayni sa'opo no kawas, malosakarikec sto sakavakat no 'orip no Yincumin, saka o Pangcah a tamdaw, ano iraay ko adada, o pades ato ira ko tatiihay a manmaan a demakan, maemin mitahidang to kiwkay mipadang. O tahapinangan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ == o~u kaitiraan no~una nijaro~uʡ itiraaj i sakaʡətp ʡapiɾis no~u sawaɾian a to~uko~us no~u tajwan.o~u no~u tafaɾo~uŋ no~u paŋʦaħ i, o~u so~uwaɾ s* a ʦəʦaj, ʦaaj ka ɾaʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. pakajni i fako~uŋ a ʦiɾakaɾa ɾo~uto~uk a tjani ko~u tato~uʡas no~u tafaɾo~un a nijaro~uʡ, i riko~ur i, ta maɾinaħ ko~u finawɾan i ɬ~ɮo~uŋ-fo~u nijaro~uʡ saan. saka , masaʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʦaaj ka pipaɾo~umaan a səra. samisaɾinaɾinaħan ko~ura panijaro~uʡan ŋara taħaniniaj tafaɾo~un. i ʡajaw ħo~u, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u apaɾaŋ ħananajaj a kaɾaŋ i ʡaɾo~u, saka, o~u "ʡafaɾo~uŋ" ko~u ʡajawaj a ŋaŋan no~u tafaɾo~un, faɾiʦ ħan sano~u ko~u~uwapiŋ o~u apaɾo~uŋ ħananaj, o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~unini a so~uwaɾ o~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj a kaɾaŋ sanaj , o~urasaka faɾiʦ ħan to~u to~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~uno~u sano~u ko~u~uwao~uiŋan a paŋaŋan to~u *** ko~unini,** ****** ,no~uwnəws .</rəf>o~u ro~umai, ɾra ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a səra ħananaj a so~uwaɾ itini. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u tafaɾo~uŋ a rijaro~uʡ, o~u taʡakaj a nijaro~uʡ i iɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u *o~u~uaŋfo~u~u-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u tafaɾo~un , itini i ira ko~u səpat a nijaro~uʡ pisao~upo~uan, o~u kawaɾian a nijaro~uʡ ,o~u saətipan a nijaro~uʡ ,o~u satatimo~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ ato~u saʡamisan a nijaro~uʡ a masao~upo~u itini i tafaɾo~un, itira i tafaɾo~unan iraaj ko~u patijamaj iraaj ko~u matajaɾaj, o~uja to~u ko~u sakaʡaɾo~uman. sa o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam i o~u ** ħan. pakajni i sakaʡo~urip o~u paɾa ko~u pinəŋnəŋan no~u tafaɾo~un, i ənaraj ko~u ʡo~urip a paŋʦaħ ħaw i, faŋʦaɾ ko~u pisapaɾa no~u tafaɾo~un, misafo~uno~un a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ paəɬ~ɮəŋ sa to~u kakaənən, taɬ~ɮa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mapaɾo~umaaj panaj, o~u ɾamɾo~u, o~u təfo~us, o~u ko~uŋa, ɾo~usaj ato~u masamaamaa:naj. ira ko~u ʡo~usaw manaʡaŋ, to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj misaɬ~ɮatəŋ, anʦa taɾaɾo~uto~uk miʡaɬ~ɮo~up, miɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ ato~u miɬ~ɮatəŋ to~u no~u paɾa a ɬ~ɮatəŋ, ro~uma i, taɾaʡaɾo~u mitafo~uko~uɬ~ɮ mifo~utiŋ, ano~u i paɾa to~u, i fataɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾan, i ɾawaʦ no~u ʡaɾo~u, i ɾo~uto~uk to~u ħaw i, iraaj ko~u mamaɾito~uɬ~ɮ naŋra itira. ʦaaj kanikaw to~u kakaənən. o~u ro~uma i, ira ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a rajraj no~u paŋʦaħ i tafaɾo~uŋ, mapakanəŋnəŋ to~u ko~u ʡato~umo~u,nito~uʡto~uʡan,mitəno~uo~un ato~u nakamajan to~u sakiʡo~urip a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uan. sato~u maəmin ʦinanəŋ ko~u mato~uʡasaj no~u ʡamis. i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾisin no~u paŋʦaħ i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u ʦəʦaj a miħəʦaan, o~u satataʡakaj ħaw i, ja iɾisin no~u kaɾo~unijaro~uʡ itiniaj i faɾo~uaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. o~u ro~uma sato~u , itini i ira ko~u pitaʡo~uŋ ŋara to~u to~uʡas ato~u rajraj no~u paŋʦaħ, o~unini a piiɾisinan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kao~uɾaħan no~u miħo~uɾo~uɾaj a tajra mikapo~ut to~u aʦaŋ no~u kaɾo~unijaro~uʡ. o~u rikisi no~u tafaɾo~uŋ misaŋaʡ to~u ʡato~umo~u o~u so~uwaɾ no~u manaʡaŋaj a ɾitiɬ~ɮ no~u rikisi i, i ʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj so~uʡo~ut ira ko~u ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a miħəʦaan, iraaj to~u ko~u pisaŋaʡan to~u ʡato~umo~u no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u sarakataj misaŋaʡ to~u ʡato~umo~u ko~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan saan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u rikisi. o~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ itija ħo~u i, o~u tataʡakaj pisaŋaʡan to~u ʡato~umo~u, i ʡajaw ħo~u, o~u so~utaʡ ko~u sapisaŋaʡ naŋra to~u kapo~uwa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u misaŋaʡan to~u sakiʡo~urip a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, o~u kajsiŋ, o~u saɾa, o~u ko~upo~u ato~u... masamaamaa:naj a kapo~uwa. o~u nakamajan misaŋaʡan a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan i, o~u ro~uma so~uto~u, ira ko~u ʡato~umo~u, o~u ko~urəŋ, o~u tato~uro~unan, o~u tamaŋan...ato~u masamaamaanaj. nikao~urira, jo~u tajni to~u ko~u ripo~un a miko~uwan to~u tajwan ħo~uw i, misatapaŋ a misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u misaʡato~umo~u a tajaɾ. pasajra to~u pisafo~uno~un a paɾo~uma to~u panaj, nika manəŋnəŋ ħo~u ita ko~u pisaŋaʡan to~u ʡato~umo~u a kajsijaan no~u saʡajawaj i ato~umo~u a nijaro~uʡ. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u tafo~u~u*an ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u saʡo~usi no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~uno~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kaɾinko~u ko~uwan, ira ko~u *,*** ko~u ɾo~umaʡ *.* ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~u saʡawaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ o~u ***ato~u ***, i **** miħəʦaan a saʡo~usi ʡɬ~ɮəŋan *,*** ko~utamɬ~ɮaw ato~u *** ko~utamɬ~ɮaw. tafaɾo~uŋ itiniaj i *o~u~uaŋfo~u~u ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin itiniaj i *o~u~uaŋfo~u~un-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən(***so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam) ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ira ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~u fataʡan a nijaro~uʡ, o~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ, miɾiɾis to~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u siwko~uɾaŋ a sinijaro~uʡ, na itira i tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u kaɾiŋko~u taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i ʦiɾamitaj, nawħani maəmin panijaro~uʡ i ɾawaʦ no~u siwko~uɾan a tarawaɬ~ɮaw sa mapaŋaŋan to~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis. ira ko~u fataʡan a nijaro~uʡ, o~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u saɬ~ɮo~ua nijaro~uʡ, o~u ato~umo~u a nijaro~uʡ, o~u kaɾo~uto~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u kaɾo~uto~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u faħo~uɾ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u ɾaso~uʡaj a nijaro~uʡ ato~u o~u kakaj a nijaro~u, faɾo~u a nijaro~uʡ ko~u pipo~uɾo~uŋan. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ i, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u pito~uo~uran no~u nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u tiŋsikiw, o~u kirisito~u-kiw, o~u taw-kiw, o~u sintaw-kiw ato~u to~uʡas a kawas no~u ʡamis. o~u tiŋsikiw a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj. itini i ira ko~u pito~uo~uran ŋara, pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kawas, maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakab~vakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin, saka o~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u iraaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, o~u paɬ~ɮəs ato~u ira ko~u tatiiħaj a manmaan a ɬ~ɮəmakan, maəmin mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kiwkaj mipaɬ~ɮaŋ. o~u taħapinaŋan
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Tafalong == O kaitiraan nona niyaro' itiraay i saka'etp 'apilis no sawalian a tokos no Taywan.O no Tafalong no pangcah i, o sowal są a cecay, caay ka lacodad. pakayni i Fakong a Cilakala lotok a tyani ko tato'as no Tafalon a niyaro', i rikor i, ta malinah ko finawlan i Dong-fo niyaro' saan. Saka , Masa'alomanay ko i niyaro'ay a tamdaw ato caay ka pipalomaan a sera. samisalinalinahan kora paniyaro'an ngara tahaniniay Tafalon. i 'ayaw ho, adihay ko apalang hananayay a kalang i 'alo, saka, o "'afalong" ko 'ayaway a ngangan no Tafalon, falic han sano Kuwaping o Apalong hananay, o tatodong nonini a sowal o Adihayay ko kohecalay a kalang sanay , orasaka falic han to to Tafalong, ono sano Kuwaoingan a pangangan to 太巴塱 konini,巴塱 祖靈庇護之地 ,Nownews .</ref>o romai, lra ko kakahaday a sera hananay a sowal itini. O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Tafalong a riyaro', o ta'akay a niyaro' i ilaloma'ay no Guangfu-syang (光復鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Tafalon , itini i ira ko sepat a niyaro' pisaopoan, o kawalian a niyaro' ,o saetipan a niyaro' ,o satatimolan a niyaro' ato sa'amisan a niyaro' a masaopo itini i Tafalon, itira i Tafalonan iraay ko patiyamay iraay ko matayalay, oya to ko saka'aloman. sa o sowal no holam i o 富田 han. Pakayni i saka'orip o pala ko pinengnengan no Tafalon, i enaray ko 'orip a Pangcah haw i, fangcal ko pisapala no Tafalon, misafonon a malingad paedeng sa to kakaenen, tada adihay ko mapalomaay panay, o lamlo, o tefos, o konga, losay ato masamaamaa:nay. ira ko 'osaw mana'ang, to laday misadateng, anca talalotok mi'adop, midongec ato midateng to no pala a dateng, roma i, tala'alo mitafokod mifoting, ano i pala to, i fatad no lalan, i lawac no 'alo, i lotok to haw i, iraay ko mamalitod nangra itira. caay kanikaw to kakaenen. o roma i, Ira ko talolongay a rayray no Pangcah i Tafalong, mapakanengneng to ko 'atomo,nito'to'an,mitenoon ato nakamayan to saki'orip a lalosidan i niyaroan. sato maemin cinaneng ko mato'asay no 'Amis. i polong no lisin no Pangcah i laloma' no cecay a mihecaan, o satata'akay haw i, ya ilisin no kaloniyaro' itiniay i faloay a folad. o roma sato , itini i ira ko pita'ong ngara to to'as ato rayray no pangcah, onini a piilisinan a romi'ad, o kaolahan no mihololay a tayra mikapot to acang no kaloniyaro'. O Rikisi no Tafalong Misanga' to 'atomo O sowal no mana'angay a litid no rikisi i, i 'ayaw no cecay so'ot ira ko lima polo' a mihecaan, iraay to ko pisanga'an to 'atomo no Pangcah. o sarakatay misanga' to 'atomo ko 'Amis a finacadan saan ko sowal no rikisi. O Tafalong a niyaro' itiya ho i, o tata'akay pisanga'an to 'atomo, i 'ayaw ho, o sota' ko sapisanga' nangra to kapowa, adihay ko misanga'an to saki'orip a lalosidan, o kaysing, o sala, o kopo ato... masamaamaa:nay a kapowa. o nakamayan misanga'an a lalosidan i, o roma soto, ira ko 'atomo, o koreng, o tatoronan, o tamangan...ato masamaamaanay. nikaorira, yo tayni to ko Ripon a mikowan to Taywan how i, misatapang a misawad ko niyaro'ay a tamdaw to misa'atomo a tayal. pasayra to pisafonon a paloma to panay, nika manengneng ho ita ko pisanga'an to 'atomo a kaysiyaan no sa'ayaway i Atomo a niyaro'. O nikalopisak no Tafugan Do'edoen ko sa'osi no Citodongay tono kalotamdaw a demak no Kalinko kowan, ira ko 5,000 ko loma' 1.2 'ofad ko tamdaw no Tafalong, o sa'awaay ko tamdaw a niyaro' o 大華村ato 大富村, i 2022 mihecaan a sa'osi 'dengan 1,349 kotamdaw ato 315 kotamdaw. Tafalong Itiniay i Guangfu Cen no Hualien ko Tafalong a niyaro', 1,007 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,958 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 2,609 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 349 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis83%, roma4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomin itiniay i Guangfun-syang (光復鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen(花蓮縣sowal no holam) ko Tafalong a niyaro', O tatapangan a niyaro', ira ko Tafalong, o Fata'an a niyaro', o Kiwit a niyaro', mililis to tarawadaw no Siwkolang a siniyaro', na itira i tarawadaw no Kalingko talatimol tangasa i Cilamitay, nawhani maemin paniyaro' i lawac no Siwkolan a tarawadaw sa mapangangan to Siwkolan a 'amis. ira ko Fata'an a niyaro', o Tafalong a niyaro', o Sadoa niyaro', o Atomo a niyaro', o Kalotong a niyaro', o Kalotong a niyaro', o Fahol a niyaro', o Laso'ay a niyaro' ato O kakay a niyaro, falo a niyaro' ko pipolongan. O pitooran no finawlan O pitooran ko finawlan no Tafalong i, adihay ko pitooran no niyaro' a tamdaw, ira ko tingsikiw, o kirisito-kiw, o taw-kiw, o sintaw-kiw ato to'as a kawas no 'amis. o tingsikiw a tamdaw ko ka adihay. itini i ira ko pitooran ngara, pakayni sa'opo no kawas, malosakarikec sto sakavakat no 'orip no Yincumin, saka o Pangcah a tamdaw, ano iraay ko adada, o pades ato ira ko tatiihay a manmaan a demakan, maemin mitahidang to kiwkay mipadang. O tahapinangan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ == o~u kaitiraan no~una nijaro~uʡ itiraaj i sakaʡətp ʡapiɾis no~u sawaɾian a to~uko~us no~u tajwan.o~u no~u tafaɾo~uŋ no~u paŋʦaħ i, o~u so~uwaɾ s* a ʦəʦaj, ʦaaj ka ɾaʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. pakajni i fako~uŋ a ʦiɾakaɾa ɾo~uto~uk a tjani ko~u tato~uʡas no~u tafaɾo~un a nijaro~uʡ, i riko~ur i, ta maɾinaħ ko~u finawɾan i ɬ~ɮo~uŋ-fo~u nijaro~uʡ saan. saka , masaʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u i nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʦaaj ka pipaɾo~umaan a səra. samisaɾinaɾinaħan ko~ura panijaro~uʡan ŋara taħaniniaj tafaɾo~un. i ʡajaw ħo~u, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u apaɾaŋ ħananajaj a kaɾaŋ i ʡaɾo~u, saka, o~u "ʡafaɾo~uŋ" ko~u ʡajawaj a ŋaŋan no~u tafaɾo~un, faɾiʦ ħan sano~u ko~u~uwapiŋ o~u apaɾo~uŋ ħananaj, o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~unini a so~uwaɾ o~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj a kaɾaŋ sanaj , o~urasaka faɾiʦ ħan to~u to~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~uno~u sano~u ko~u~uwao~uiŋan a paŋaŋan to~u *** ko~unini,** ****** ,no~uwnəws .</rəf>o~u ro~umai, ɾra ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a səra ħananaj a so~uwaɾ itini. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u tafaɾo~uŋ a rijaro~uʡ, o~u taʡakaj a nijaro~uʡ i iɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u *o~u~uaŋfo~u~u-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u tafaɾo~un , itini i ira ko~u səpat a nijaro~uʡ pisao~upo~uan, o~u kawaɾian a nijaro~uʡ ,o~u saətipan a nijaro~uʡ ,o~u satatimo~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ ato~u saʡamisan a nijaro~uʡ a masao~upo~u itini i tafaɾo~un, itira i tafaɾo~unan iraaj ko~u patijamaj iraaj ko~u matajaɾaj, o~uja to~u ko~u sakaʡaɾo~uman. sa o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam i o~u ** ħan. pakajni i sakaʡo~urip o~u paɾa ko~u pinəŋnəŋan no~u tafaɾo~un, i ənaraj ko~u ʡo~urip a paŋʦaħ ħaw i, faŋʦaɾ ko~u pisapaɾa no~u tafaɾo~un, misafo~uno~un a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ paəɬ~ɮəŋ sa to~u kakaənən, taɬ~ɮa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mapaɾo~umaaj panaj, o~u ɾamɾo~u, o~u təfo~us, o~u ko~uŋa, ɾo~usaj ato~u masamaamaa:naj. ira ko~u ʡo~usaw manaʡaŋ, to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj misaɬ~ɮatəŋ, anʦa taɾaɾo~uto~uk miʡaɬ~ɮo~up, miɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ ato~u miɬ~ɮatəŋ to~u no~u paɾa a ɬ~ɮatəŋ, ro~uma i, taɾaʡaɾo~u mitafo~uko~uɬ~ɮ mifo~utiŋ, ano~u i paɾa to~u, i fataɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾan, i ɾawaʦ no~u ʡaɾo~u, i ɾo~uto~uk to~u ħaw i, iraaj ko~u mamaɾito~uɬ~ɮ naŋra itira. ʦaaj kanikaw to~u kakaənən. o~u ro~uma i, ira ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a rajraj no~u paŋʦaħ i tafaɾo~uŋ, mapakanəŋnəŋ to~u ko~u ʡato~umo~u,nito~uʡto~uʡan,mitəno~uo~un ato~u nakamajan to~u sakiʡo~urip a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uan. sato~u maəmin ʦinanəŋ ko~u mato~uʡasaj no~u ʡamis. i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɾisin no~u paŋʦaħ i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u ʦəʦaj a miħəʦaan, o~u satataʡakaj ħaw i, ja iɾisin no~u kaɾo~unijaro~uʡ itiniaj i faɾo~uaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. o~u ro~uma sato~u , itini i ira ko~u pitaʡo~uŋ ŋara to~u to~uʡas ato~u rajraj no~u paŋʦaħ, o~unini a piiɾisinan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kao~uɾaħan no~u miħo~uɾo~uɾaj a tajra mikapo~ut to~u aʦaŋ no~u kaɾo~unijaro~uʡ. o~u rikisi no~u tafaɾo~uŋ misaŋaʡ to~u ʡato~umo~u o~u so~uwaɾ no~u manaʡaŋaj a ɾitiɬ~ɮ no~u rikisi i, i ʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj so~uʡo~ut ira ko~u ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a miħəʦaan, iraaj to~u ko~u pisaŋaʡan to~u ʡato~umo~u no~u paŋʦaħ. o~u sarakataj misaŋaʡ to~u ʡato~umo~u ko~u ʡamis a finaʦaɬ~ɮan saan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u rikisi. o~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ itija ħo~u i, o~u tataʡakaj pisaŋaʡan to~u ʡato~umo~u, i ʡajaw ħo~u, o~u so~utaʡ ko~u sapisaŋaʡ naŋra to~u kapo~uwa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u misaŋaʡan to~u sakiʡo~urip a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, o~u kajsiŋ, o~u saɾa, o~u ko~upo~u ato~u... masamaamaa:naj a kapo~uwa. o~u nakamajan misaŋaʡan a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan i, o~u ro~uma so~uto~u, ira ko~u ʡato~umo~u, o~u ko~urəŋ, o~u tato~uro~unan, o~u tamaŋan...ato~u masamaamaanaj. nikao~urira, jo~u tajni to~u ko~u ripo~un a miko~uwan to~u tajwan ħo~uw i, misatapaŋ a misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u misaʡato~umo~u a tajaɾ. pasajra to~u pisafo~uno~un a paɾo~uma to~u panaj, nika manəŋnəŋ ħo~u ita ko~u pisaŋaʡan to~u ʡato~umo~u a kajsijaan no~u saʡajawaj i ato~umo~u a nijaro~uʡ. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u tafo~u~u*an ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u saʡo~usi no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~uno~u kaɾo~utamɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kaɾinko~u ko~uwan, ira ko~u *,*** ko~u ɾo~umaʡ *.* ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~u saʡawaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a nijaro~uʡ o~u ***ato~u ***, i **** miħəʦaan a saʡo~usi ʡɬ~ɮəŋan *,*** ko~utamɬ~ɮaw ato~u *** ko~utamɬ~ɮaw. tafaɾo~uŋ itiniaj i *o~u~uaŋfo~u~u ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin itiniaj i *o~u~uaŋfo~u~un-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən(***so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam) ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ira ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~u fataʡan a nijaro~uʡ, o~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ, miɾiɾis to~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u siwko~uɾaŋ a sinijaro~uʡ, na itira i tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u kaɾiŋko~u taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i ʦiɾamitaj, nawħani maəmin panijaro~uʡ i ɾawaʦ no~u siwko~uɾan a tarawaɬ~ɮaw sa mapaŋaŋan to~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis. ira ko~u fataʡan a nijaro~uʡ, o~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u saɬ~ɮo~ua nijaro~uʡ, o~u ato~umo~u a nijaro~uʡ, o~u kaɾo~uto~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u kaɾo~uto~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u faħo~uɾ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u ɾaso~uʡaj a nijaro~uʡ ato~u o~u kakaj a nijaro~u, faɾo~u a nijaro~uʡ ko~u pipo~uɾo~uŋan. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ i, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u pito~uo~uran no~u nijaro~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u tiŋsikiw, o~u kirisito~u-kiw, o~u taw-kiw, o~u sintaw-kiw ato~u to~uʡas a kawas no~u ʡamis. o~u tiŋsikiw a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj. itini i ira ko~u pito~uo~uran ŋara, pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kawas, maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakab~vakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin, saka o~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u iraaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, o~u paɬ~ɮəs ato~u ira ko~u tatiiħaj a manmaan a ɬ~ɮəmakan, maəmin mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kiwkaj mipaɬ~ɮaŋ. o~u taħapinaŋan
